sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n1448" key="a)do/nhtos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀδόνητος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">δονέω</etym>) <sense id="n1448.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">unshaken,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">AP</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.267</biblScope> </bibl> (Paul.
